title: Beijing Heat Wave
lead: Beijing is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.49. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Beijing is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 14.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 9%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 14.4 km/h. 
 The lack of moisture in the air is exacerbating the heat, making it feel even more extreme.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
